titleStmt.title: SII 20.18: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 18. (B.K. No. 57 of 1935-36.) SAUNDATTI, PARASAGAD TALUK, BELGAUM DISTRICT.

p.hi: On a slab set up in the Basti-guḍi.

summary.p: The record is dated Śaka 902, Vikrama, Paushya, śu. 10, Thursday, Uttarāyaṇa-Saṅkrāuti. The Saṅkrānti occurred on Thursday, December 23, A.D. 980. The tithi was, however, śu. 14 on that day and not śu. 10 as stated in the record.

The inscription registers the grant of 150 mattars of land by the Raṭṭa chief Śāntivarmarasa to the Jaina monastery (basadi) caused to be constructed by him at Sugandhavarti (i.e., modern Saundatti). The genealogy of this chief is given. The gift was entrusted to Bāhubali-bhaṭṭāraka. It also records another gift of 150 mattars of land by the chief's mother Nījiyabbarasi to the same monastery.
The record is published in JBBRAS. Vol. X, p. 204.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© raṭṭakuḷānveyanṛparuṁ paṭṭada tavarmmanegaḷenipa gāvuṁḍugaḷuṁ biṭṭarjjinēṁdra pūjege neṭṭane dhānyaṁga
ḷoḷage po kuḷamaṁ . ṟaṭṭara paṭṭajinālayakiṭṭaḷavādayvatokkalanumatadiṁdaṁ koṭṭarjjinēṁdra pūjege neṭṭane
[gha?] . dīpāvaḷiya parvvakke dēvara sūḍariṁge gāṇadalommāneṇṇe .
© śrīmatparamagaṁbhīrasyādvādāmōghalāṁcchanaṁ jīyāttraiḷōkyanāthasya śāsanaṁ jinaśāsanaṁ © ©
© svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirājaparamēśvaraparama
bhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattailapadēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhi
vṛddhiyiṁ saluttamire . tatpādapadmōpajīvi . samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabdamahāsāmantaṁ samaravijaya
lakṣmīkāntaṁ baisānvaya sarōjavanamārttaṇḍaṁ nuḍidaṁte gaṇḍaṁ hayavatsarājaṁ rūpamanōjaṁ parabaḷa sūṟe
kāṟaṁ vairibaṁgāṟaṁ narasaṁkabhīmaṁ caladaṁkarāmaṁ gaṇḍaragaṇḍaṁ vairibhēruṇḍaṁ pratipannamaṁdaraṁ śaraṇāga
tavajrapaṁjaraṁ śrīmatśāntivarmmarasara vaṁśāvatārameṁteṁdoḍe śrīmadamarēṁdravibavōddāmaṁ
saṁgrāmarāmanūrjitatējaṁ bhīmaparākramanenisidanī mahiyoḷ pṛthvīrāmananupamarūpaṁ . tatsu
ta . Arūḍhavatsarājanudāraguṇaṁ vinutakaṁdukādityaṁ śrīnārīkāntaṁ nirjjitavairivrajanenisi piṭṭugaṁ
sale negaṟdaṁ . v® . Aṁtakanante baṁdidiroḷāṁtajavarmmana nōḍisutte māṟāṁtaranēkaraṁ tavisi vastugaḷaṁ madavāraṇaṁgaḷaṁ kānte
yaraṁ turaṁgacayamaṁ piḍidittoḍe mecci rābheyaṁ dantiyanittanaṁtaduve pēḷade piṭṭaga ninna gella maṁ . ta
dagrapatni . v® . pogaḷalaḷuṁbamappa caritaṁ mige baṇṇisalabjasaṁbhavaṁgagaṇitamappa rūpavibha
vaṁ patibhaktiyoḷoṁdi sajjanikege neleyāda māṁtanada peṁpu samaṁtaḷavaṭṭa nījikabbarasi
ge saṁdarundhati peṟarddore yeṁdaḍe dōsavalladē . tattanūja . kaṁ . śrīmadudayādriśikha
rōddāmōdayatapanavibhavarūpaṁ kīrttiśrīmahimātiśayaṁ jayarāmāramaṇaṁ jitā
ri śāntanṛpāḷaṁ . dayeyiṁdoḷpina teḷpiniṁ guṇagaṇāḷaṁkāradiṁ mārgganirṇnayadiṁ tatvavi
cāradiṁ gamakadiṁdāhārabhaiṣaj�sābhayaśāstrāmaḷadānadiṁdadhikaneṁdaṁdoḷpiniṁ śāntivarmmana vi
khyātiyanoṁde nālageyoḷinnēvaṇṇipōṁ baṇṇipa . tadagrapatni . śrīvanite tāne bandu mahīva
nitege tiḷakamenisi śāntana lalitaśrīvaniteyāda vibhavamanēvogaḷvudō caṁdikabbeyarasiya peṁpa .
© yati tārakāparītaḥ . kaṇḍūragaṇōrukanṭhivṛddhikaraḥ bāhubalidēvacaṁdrō jinasamayanabhasthaḷē
bhāti . vyākaraṇatīkṣṇadaṁṣṭrassiddāntanakhapramāṇakēsarabhāraḥ . bāhubalidēvasiṁhaḥ pravādigajatīvrama
daharassaṁjayat . v® . Avanīpāḷānataśrīpadakamaḷayugaṁ tatvanirnniktarāddhāntavidaṁ cāritrara
tnākaranamaḷavacaśrīvadhūkāṁta naṁgōdbhavadarppāraṇyadāvānaḷanu ditalasadbōdhasaṁśuddhanētraṁ ravicaṁdra
svāmi bhavyāṁbujadinapanaghaughādrisadvajrapāta . kaṁ . kaṇḍūrggaṇābdhicaṁdranakhaṇḍitasutapōvibhā
sikhaṇḍitamadanaṁ diṇḍīrapiṇḍa suravēdaṇḍayaśaṟpiṇḍanarhaṇandimunīṁdra . v® . kanturājagajēṁdrakēsa
ri bhavyalōkasukhākaraṁ kāṁtavāgvanitāmanōramanugravīratapōmayaṁ śāntamūrtti digantakīrtti vi
rājitaṁ śubhacaṁdrasiddhāntadēvaniḷēśavaṁditapādapaṁkaruhadvayaṁ . ka . nutayāpanīya saṁgha pra
tīta kaṇḍūrggaṇābdhicaṁdramareṁdī kṣitivaḷeyaṁ pogaḷvinamunnativettarmnaunidēvadivyamunīṁdrar .
jitakarmmārātibhūpāḷakakuḷatiḷakāḷaṁkṛtāṁghridvayaṁ rājitabhavyavrātapaṁkēruha
vanadinapaṁ cārucāritramārggāṁcitasūktaṁ śabdavidyāgamakamaḷabhavaṁ śrī prabhācaṁdradēvabratiṣa
ṭtarkākaḷaṁkaṁgeṇeyene negaṟdaṁ jainamārgābdhicaṁdra © svasti sakanṛpakālātītasaṁvatsaraśataṁga 902ne
ya vikrama saṁvatsarada pauṣya śuddha daśamī bṛhaspativāradaṁdinuttarāyaṇa śaṁkramaṇadoḷ bāhu
balibhaṭṭārakara kālaṁ kacci śāntivarmarasaṁ sugandhavarttiyal tanna māḍisida basadigāvūra tanna sīvaṭada polado
ḷage sarvvabādhāparihāramāgi biṭṭa mattarnnūṟayvattadaṟa caturāghāṭada sīmeyāvudeṁdaḍe tadda
ra polada baḍagivolada sandinalīśānyada guḍḍe . Alliṁ teṁkaleḷeyakeṟeya biḷiya kallu . Alliṁ paḍuva
lu sīvaṭṭada sandinoḷu nairitiya guḍḍe . Alliṁ baḍagalu sīvaṭṭada tad�ra polada saṁdinalu vāyavyada
guḍḍe © mattaṁ nijiyabbarasi tanna magaṁ śāntivarmmarasaṁ māḍisida piriya basadige tanna sīvaṭaṁ piri
ya pasuṇḍige pōda baṭṭeyiṁ teṁka kāḍiyūrapolada nūṟayvattu matta
rkkeyyaṁ namasyamāgi biṭṭaḷā bhūmiya catussī ra kukkuṁbāḷa
polada saṁdinalīśānyada guḍḍe . Alliṁ teṁka kukkuṁbāḷa sugandhava
rttiya polada sandinalāgnēyada gu gina kūḍa
ginoḷage nairitiya gu ḍḍe vāyavya
ḍḍe . Intinitu bhūmiyi rvvaruṁpra
suvar © mā
munāsaṁga
davargge
ṇḍan
sdhunarāṁ ṣaṣṭi
Digital edition of SII 20.18 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
